achievements.title: Fish Out of Water
achievements.description: Win a game of "Magikarp's Splash" in Kids Club mode against 3 COMs on Hard difficulty with a score of at least 30 points and without pausing [1P]
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Honor Student
achievements.description: Win a game of "Clefairy Says" in Kids Club mode against 3 COMs on Hard difficulty without making any mistakes and without pausing [1P]
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Rat Race
achievements.description: Win a game of "Run, Rattata, Run" in Kids Club mode against 3 COMs on Hard difficulty without hitting any hurdles and without pausing [1P]
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Hypnotherapy
achievements.description: Win a game of "Snore War" in Kids Club mode against 3 COMs on Hard difficulty without missing Hypnosis more than 5 times and without pausing [1P]
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Lightning Fast
achievements.description: Win a game of "Thundering Dynamo" in Kids Club mode against 3 COMs on Hard difficulty within 8 seconds and without pausing [1P]
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: No Chopsticks Required
achievements.description: Win a game of "Sushi-Go-Round" in Kids Club mode against 3 COMs on Hard difficulty with a score of at least 12,000 Pokémon Dollars and without pausing [1P]
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Shoot Some Hoops
achievements.description: Win a game of "Ekans' Hoop Hurl" in Kids Club mode against 3 COMs on Hard difficulty with a score of at least 15 points and without pausing [1P]
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Tough It Out
achievements.description: Win a game of "Rock Harden" in Kids Club mode against 3 COMs on Hard difficulty with at least 50% health remaining and without pausing [1P]
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Water at the End of the Tunnel
achievements.description: Win a game of "Dig! Dig! Dig!" in Kids Club mode against 3 COMs on Hard difficulty within 6.5 seconds and without pausing [1P]
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: COM Sweep
achievements.description: Become the Champ of "Who's the Best?" in Kids Club mode by earning 9 wins against 3 COMs on Normal difficulty without losing [1P]
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Go Hard or Go Home
achievements.description: Become the Champ of "Who's the Best?" in Kids Club mode by earning 9 wins against 3 COMs on Hard difficulty without letting them accumulate more than 9 wins [1P]
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: Hyperactive COMs
achievements.description: Unlock Hyper difficulty in Kids Club mode by earning 5 consecutive wins or ties in "Who's the Best?" against 3 COMs on Hard difficulty [1P]
achievements.author: gde

achievements.title: I Swear, They're Cheating
achievements.description: Become the Champ of "Who's the Best?" in Kids Club mode by earning 9 wins against 3 COMs on Hyper difficulty [1P]
achievements.author: gde
